result.stdout:
Description:
  Rn.CronTool

Usage:
  Rn.CronTool [options]

Options:
  -r, --rootDir <rootDir>  Root directory to use when resolving jobs [default: /tmp/inspectra-static-rncron-d35679a2-ad2a245f]
  -j, --job <job>          The name of the job you wish to run []
  --version                Show version information
  -?, -h, --help           Show help and usage information
